parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
const body = input.body || input;

const sessionId = body.session_id;
if (!sessionId) throw new Error('session_id is required');

return [{ json: {
  session_id: sessionId,
  idea_id: body.idea_id,
  voice_script_id: body.voice_script_id,
  video_prompt_id: body.video_prompt_id,
  product_image_url: body.product_image_url || '',
  artikul: body.artikul || '',
  show_artikul: body.show_artikul || false,
  tts_provider: body.tts_provider || 'openai',
  tts_voice: body.tts_voice || 'alloy',
  tts_speed: body.tts_speed || 1.0,
  video_provider: body.video_provider || 'gptunnel',
  subtitle_font: body.subtitle_font || 'Arial',
  subtitle_size: body.subtitle_size || 42,
  subtitle_color: body.subtitle_color || 'white',
  subtitle_outline: body.subtitle_outline || 2,
  watermark_url: body.watermark_url || '',
  watermark_position: body.watermark_position || 'top-right',
  watermark_opacity: body.watermark_opacity || 0.7
}}];

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET status = 'processing', current_step = 'loading_data', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};

SELECT vs.script_text, vs.timing_marks, vp.prompt_text, vp.scene_descriptions, vp.style_reference,
       ci.title, ci.concept, ci.visual_description
FROM pipeline_sessions ps
LEFT JOIN voice_scripts vs ON vs.id = ps.voice_script_id
LEFT JOIN video_prompts vp ON vp.id = ps.video_prompt_id
LEFT JOIN content_ideas ci ON ci.id = ps.idea_id
WHERE ps.id = {{ $json.session_id }};
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET current_step = 'tts', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "tts-1",
  "input": "{{ $('🔗 Объединение данных').first().json.script_text }}",
  "voice": "{{ $('🔗 Объединение данных').first().json.tts_voice || 'alloy' }}",
  "speed": {{ $('🔗 Объединение данных').first().json.tts_speed || 1.0 }},
  "response_format": "mp3"
}

parameters.query: UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET current_step = 'video_generation', voice_file_url = '/output/voice_{{ $json.session_id }}.mp3', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET current_step = 'montage', raw_video_url = '{{ $json.raw_video_url }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};

UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET 
  status = 'ready_for_review',
  current_step = 'review',
  final_video_url = '/output/final_{{ $('🎞️ Сборка FFmpeg').first().json.session_id }}.mp4',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('🎞️ Сборка FFmpeg').first().json.session_id }};

UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET status = 'error', error_message = '{{ $json.error?.message || "Unknown" }}', error_step = '{{ $json.error?.node || '' }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id || 0 }};
